reasons: stdlib HTTP returns 403 with HTML access-denied (Akamai-style bot rejection)
Surf with Chrome TLS fingerprint clears protection (HTTP 200, text/html; charset=utf-8)

protections.label: akamai-bot-manager
notes: stdlib HTTP user agents return 403 with 'Access Denied' HTML
Surf Chrome TLS fingerprint clears at runtime (probe-reachability mode: browser_http)

candidate_commands.name: search
candidate_commands.rationale: Path-slug search is the primary entry point at apartments.com

candidate_commands.name: get
candidate_commands.rationale: Listing detail page extracts schema.org microdata

generation_hints: use Surf with Chrome TLS fingerprint at runtime (UsesBrowserHTTPTransport)
all responses are HTML/SSR — extract via html_extract mode: page
no clearance cookie capture; no resident browser sidecar
schema.org microdata (meta itemprop=streetAddress|addressLocality|addressRegion|postalCode) plus data-beds / data-baths / data-maxrent attributes are the primary extraction targets

warnings.message: Apartments.com (CoStar) employs Akamai-style bot detection. stdlib HTTP returns 403; Surf with Chrome TLS fingerprint clears it. Watch for protection escalation that might require Chrome-clearance cookie import or full-browser fallback in future versions.
